message:
The other day, I found myself in the kitchen, making dinner while my kids were busy with their homework. Suddenly, I noticed a little smoke rising from the pan—oops! My heart raced as I remembered our family escape plan, but instead of panicking, I took a deep breath and turned it into a cozy moment. I called the kids over, we grabbed some marshmallows, and made a fun little fire drill out of it. We practiced our escape routes together while snacking on those marshmallows, and it turned into a great bonding experience! 

Fire safety doesn’t have to be all serious, right? Just a little reminder to keep those smoke alarms checked and have an escape plan handy—this little refresher helped! What creative ways have you found to make safety fun at home?
